ddls:
CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the album */,
  "album_title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "album_length" TEXT /* Total length of the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the album */,
  "cover_art" TEXT /* URL to the album cover art */,
  "label" TEXT /* Name of the record label */,
  "catalog_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the album within the label's catalog */,
  "upc" TEXT /* Universal Product Code for the album */,
  "is_single" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the album is a single */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the album contains explicit content */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the album was released */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Full name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography or description of the artist */,
  "debut_year" INTEGER /* Year the artist debuted */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  "instruments" TEXT /* JSON array of instruments the artist plays */,
  "influences" TEXT /* JSON array of artists who influenced the artist */,
  "awards" TEXT /* JSON array of awards the artist has won */,
  "record_label" TEXT /* Name of the artist's record label */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the track belongs to */,
  "track_title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "track_length" TEXT /* Length of the track */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number within the album */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Text of the track lyrics */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the track contains explicit content */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the music file */,
  "bitrate" INTEGER /* Bitrate of the music file */,
  "is_single" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the track is a single */,
  "lyricist" TEXT /* Name of the lyricist */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "mixing_engineer" TEXT /* Name of the mixing engineer */,
  "mastering_engineer" TEXT /* Name of the mastering engineer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre */,
  "related_genres" TEXT /* JSON array of related genres */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_genres" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "privacy" TEXT /* Privacy setting (public, private, shared) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "cover_art" TEXT /* URL to the playlist cover art */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* JSON array of user IDs who can edit the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., Free, Premium) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the service */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* User's birthdate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object of user preferences */,
  "listening_history" TEXT /* JSON array of recently listened tracks and albums */,
  "recommended_tracks" TEXT /* JSON array of recommended tracks based on listening history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_subscription_type FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_type") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who rated the album */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating value given by the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* Optional review text from the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was given */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the rating is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the collaboration */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album featuring the collaboration */,
  "featured_artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the featured artist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Optional reference to the track featuring the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the featured artist (e.g., featuring, producer, lyricist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_featured_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("featured_artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription type */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Name of the subscription type (e.g., Free, Premium) */,
  "price" REAL /* Monthly price for the subscription */,
  "features" TEXT /* JSON array of features included in the subscription */,
  "validity" TEXT /* Duration of the subscription validity */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription will renew */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id")
)
